input.question: Show average GPA for different scholarship amount ranges

payload.question: Show average GPA for different scholarship amount ranges

output.sql:
WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN scholarship_amount IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN scholarship_amount = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 1 AND 1000 THEN '1 - 1,000'
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 1001 AND 5000 THEN '1,001 - 5,000'
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 5001 AND 10000 THEN '5,001 - 10,000'
      ELSE '> 10,000'
    END AS scholarship_range,
    CASE
      WHEN scholarship_amount IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN scholarship_amount = 0 THEN 1
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 1 AND 1000 THEN 2
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 1001 AND 5000 THEN 3
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 5001 AND 10000 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END AS bucket_order,
    gpa
  FROM students
)
SELECT
  scholarship_range AS scholarship_range,
  bucket_order AS bucket_order,
  AVG(gpa) AS avg_gpa,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM bucketed
GROUP BY scholarship_range, bucket_order
ORDER BY bucket_order;

visualization.title: Average GPA by Scholarship Amount Range

payload.sql:
WITH bucketed AS (
  SELECT
    CASE
      WHEN scholarship_amount IS NULL THEN 'Unknown'
      WHEN scholarship_amount = 0 THEN '0'
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 1 AND 1000 THEN '1 - 1,000'
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 1001 AND 5000 THEN '1,001 - 5,000'
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 5001 AND 10000 THEN '5,001 - 10,000'
      ELSE '> 10,000'
    END AS scholarship_range,
    CASE
      WHEN scholarship_amount IS NULL THEN 0
      WHEN scholarship_amount = 0 THEN 1
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 1 AND 1000 THEN 2
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 1001 AND 5000 THEN 3
      WHEN scholarship_amount BETWEEN 5001 AND 10000 THEN 4
      ELSE 5
    END AS bucket_order,
    gpa
  FROM students
)
SELECT
  scholarship_range AS scholarship_range,
  bucket_order AS bucket_order,
  AVG(gpa) AS avg_gpa,
  COUNT(*) AS student_count
FROM bucketed
GROUP BY scholarship_range, bucket_order
ORDER BY bucket_order;
